who: medical clinic operations staff managing calibration tasks for 5–15 pieces of equipment
offer: For medical clinic operations staff processing 5–15 calibration tasks/month, inconsistent scheduling causes compliance issues. We provide a scheduling tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling and tracking of calibration tasks leading to potential compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinic operations staff
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows and tools
DM outreach to medical staff with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try task scheduling interface and calibration tracking log on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
